positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u31,negated_conjecture,
    ~vertebrate(harry)).

cnf(u39,negated_conjecture,
    ~animal(harry)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~bee(X0) | ~reproduce_mf(X0)).

cnf(u43,axiom,
    ~reproduce_mf(harry)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~vertebrate(X0) | ~animal(X0) | backbone(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~backbone(X0) | ~animal(X0) | reproduce_mf(X0)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    bee(harry)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define queen_bee(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define invertebrate(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
